projectDescription: A Go HTTP service that manages custom domain ownership verification and automated TLS certificate issuance via ACME DNS-01 challenges.
keyFeatures: DNS-based domain ownership verification via TXT records
Automated TLS certificate issuance using ACME DNS-01 protocol
Asynchronous certificate polling with configurable timeout
LibSQL (Turso) database backend with embedded migrations
Container-ready with Containerfile for OCI image builds
Domain lifecycle state machine (pending → verified → certificate_pending → active / failed)
publicApiSurface: POST /domains — Create a domain and receive a verification token
GET /domains/{id} — Get domain status and metadata
POST /domains/{id}/verify — Trigger DNS TXT record verification
POST /domains/{id}/issue-certificate — Start ACME DNS-01 certificate order
